candidates.why: Header-like D&A line with no visible values and no indication it belongs specifically to COGS; selected COGS bucket is the explicit total row 'Cost of revenues/COGS', so conservative view is that any COGS-related D&A is already embedded unless separately labelled outside that bucket.

Separate operating D&A line, but it appears at the same level as overhead lines after gross contribution and is not labelled as COGS/COR-related; more likely operating overhead D&A than COGS-specific D&A.
Component of operating D&A, not specifically tied to COGS and likely part of broader overhead depreciation rather than a separate add-on to the selected COGS total.
Separate amortization line with no COGS linkage; more consistent with non-COGS operating overhead or general amortization.

variables.notes: The selected COGS reference bucket is the explicit total row 'Cost of revenues/COGS'. No D&A row is explicitly labelled as being in COGS/COR or shown as a same-level separate COGS-only addback. To avoid double counting, do not add any separate COGS D&A row.

candidates.why: Best apparent summary D&A row above operating profit. It sits alongside the selected XSGA component rows rather than beneath them, and its value closely aligns with the sum of the more granular depreciation/amortization component rows, so it should be added separately to the selected XSGA bucket.
Granular component of the broader D&A block. Not preferred because 'Ordinary depreciation' appears to be the summary row and using both would double count.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets
candidates.why: Granular depreciation component within the operating D&A block. Should not be chosen if the broader summary row 'Ordinary depreciation' is used.
Granular amortization component within the operating D&A block. Prefer the summary row instead.
Granular amortization line that appears to roll into the broader D&A total. Not preferred if 'Ordinary depreciation' is selected.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit R&D-related amortization line above operating profit. Because XRD was mapped separately outside the visible operating rows and was not included in XSGA_COMPONENTS, this row could matter for SG&A-related D&A logic; however it appears to be included within the broader operating D&A summary, so selecting only the summary row is safer.

variables.notes: Manually Changed. XSGA_COMPONENTS previously selected only 'Employee benefit expenses' and 'Other operating expenses' and explicitly excluded depreciation/amortization. The statement shows a separate operating D&A block above operating profit, so D&A is not embedded in the selected XSGA rows. 'Ordinary depreciation' appears to be the best summary row for that block; choose it alone to avoid double counting the underlying depreciation and amortization components, including the explicit R&D amortization line.
